title: Burst
description: A smart vein mining cross-platform mod, for modern minecraft.
body:
# Burst - Because Life's Too Short to Mine One Block at a Time
Tired of spending your entire weekend clicking away at a massive ore vein like some kind of medieval peasant?

Fed up with carpal tunnel syndrome from mining out entire mountains one block at a time? 

Well, say goodbye to your clicking finger cramps and hello to Burst!

## What Does It Do?
Burst is the mod for players who believe that efficiency is next to godliness (and that godliness involves a lot less clicking). 

Simply hold down the backtick key (`) and watch as your mining dreams come true faster than you can say "diamonds are forever."

### Mining Modes (Because We're Fancy Like That)

- Same Block Mode: Found a vein of coal? Clear the whole thing! It's like dominoes, but with rocks.
- Ores Only Mode: For the refined miner who only wants the good stuff. We don't discriminate against any ore - even copper deserves love.
- Tool Effective Mode: Your pickaxe knows what it wants, and it wants it NOW.
- Tunnel Mode: Need a 3x3 tunnel? We've got you covered. Perfect for when you want to pretend you're building a subway system.
- Staircase Mode: Because sometimes you need to go down in style. Who needs ladders when you can mine your way to bedrock with class?

## How to Use

Hold backtick (`) to activate - your blocks will light up in a lovely shade of "about to be obliterated"
Want to change modes? Hold Shift + backtick like you're performing some ancient mining ritual
Start breaking blocks and watch the magic happen

Try not to accidentally mine your entire base (we're not responsible for architectural disasters)

## Warning
Side effects may include: sudden urges to mine everything in sight, neighbors complaining about the sound of rapid block breaking at 3 AM, and an inexplicable feeling of power when you clear an entire cave system in seconds.

*Burst: Making strip mining socially acceptable since today!*
